# CodeHound text fixture (.txt) — materialized to .py at test/runtime
lang: python
file: sample.py
---
"""Fixture with re.compile inside a loop."""

import re


def bad(rows):
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        pat = re.compile(r"^\d+")
        if pat.match(r):
            out.append(r)
    return out


def good(rows):
    pat = re.compile(r"^\d+")
    return [r for r in rows if pat.match(r)]
